text:
There was once a curious cat named Ollie. Ollie loved the moon. Every night, Ollie would stealthily sneak out of the cozy nest in the fireplace and glide around the room. Ollie would watch the stars and dream of the moonlit forest.

One night, a giant owl snatched Ollie up into its broad wings! The owl flew far away, far beyond the moonlit forest.

Ollie woke up with a start. Where was he? Back on the ground. But something was very wrong. The stars weren't twinkling. Darkness swallowed their light. Birds didn't chirp. Everything was dark!

Then Ollie heard voices. People whispered around fires. They'd heard about a giant owl that took away stars.

"Look!" one bird said. "A tiny mouse."

The crowd crowded closer.

"Quick!" cried another. "Catch it!"

Ollie dashed into the night. His paws felt strange.
